subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Do Thou aid those who have sought help through naught save the wondrous tokens of Thy succour and triumph [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی فانصر الذین هم مااستنصروا الا ببدایع نصرک و انتصارک و
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
